# Gists

A browsable index of my GitHub Gists. It is updated automatically and allows tagging and description of github gists for nice browsing experience.

You can just fork this repo and `github.com/<your_username>/gists` would show _your_ gists too. See [HELP.md](HELP.md) for setup and how this repo works.
